Name: Freudenberg Home and Cleaning Solutions
Description:
Freudenberg Home and Cleaning Solutions is a leading provider for branded cleaning and household products and services. As part of the Freudenberg Group, a global technology group with 40.000 employees in about 60 countries, we develop leading-edge technologies, and excellent products, solutions and services for more than 30 market segments. Freudenberg Home and Cleaning Solutions is the home of global leading brands like Vileda, Vileda Professional, O-Cedar, Marigold, Gimi, Wettex, Oates and Gala. Our highly talented, motivated and results-orientated employees continuously secure and expand our leadership in markets worldwide.

Considering a career at Freudenberg Home and Cleaning Solutions? Visit our Website below for more.

Name: BSH Electrodomésticos España, S.A.
Description:
En el Grupo BSH trabajamos para mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas en el hogar a través de nuestras marcas reconocidas, productos de alta calidad y servicios y soluciones excepcionales. 

En España, fabricamos electrodomésticos en 5 plantas de producción ubicadas en Aragón, Cantabria y Navarra y contamos con marcas de electrodomésticos* establecidas en todo el mundo como Bosch, Siemens y Gaggenau, y nuestra marca local Balay. Con Home Connect, ofrecemos a los consumidores servicios digitales y soluciones sostenibles para mejorar su vida diaria.

Los empleados son la base de nuestro éxito. Por eso, fomentamos una cultura corporativa en la que nuestros más de 4.000 empleados se sienten valorados. En 2024, BSH Electrodomésticos España, S.A. ha sido certificada por duodécimo año consecutivo como empresa Top Employer.

Pero en BSH somos algo más que el fabricante de electrodomésticos líder en Europa y en España.

En el Grupo BSH creemos que la sostenibilidad tiene tres dimensiones que no se excluyen mutuamente, sino que están profundamente interrelacionadas. La protección del medio ambiente, la responsabilidad social y la sostenibilidad del negocio son los cimientos de cualquier empresa de éxito.

Nuestro objetivo es prevenir la contaminación ambiental y reducir nuestra huella. Por eso, reducimos constantemente nuestra huella de carbono e impulsamos el uso de materiales y componentes sostenibles, para que nuestros electrodomésticos estén preparados para una economía circular. 

Diseñamos tecnología dedicada a ahorrar energía y agua, y desarrollamos ideas e innovaciones que nos hacen la vida mucho más fácil a todos. 

Conoce más sobre nosotros en nuestra web http://www.bsh-group.com/es 

*BSH es licenciatario de marca para Siemens AG y Robert Bosch GmbH para las marcas Siemens y Bosch.

Name: Butterfly Gandhimathi Appliances Ltd
Description:
For over four decades, Butterfly has been a part of India’s everyday cooking journey — trusted in millions of homes and known for bringing practical innovation to the kitchen.

We believe every home has its own rhythm, personality, and way of evolving. And every kitchen is shaped by the ideas, tastes, and spirit of the people who cook in it. That belief inspires us to design appliances that are intuitive, reliable, and built for today’s evolving lifestyles.

Our culture is driven by craftsmanship, curiosity, humility, and a continual desire to improve. We take pride in being a homegrown brand built by original thinkers and everyday doers — inspired by real homes, powered by real people, and committed to making everyday living effortless and joyful.

Our renewed positioning, ‘Celebrating Change’, reflects a deep understanding of modern Indian homes — where roles shift, routines blend, and technology enhances everyday living. As a part of Crompton, one of India’s most respected home-solutions companies, we bring intelligent and intuitive solutions that simplify life in the kitchen and beyond. The fingerprint-inspired butterfly identiy brings this idea to life. Crafted from the unique swirls of a fingerprint, it represents every individual whose touch shapes Butterfly — from consumers in their homes to employees who make it possible to our partners who take the ideas forward. It reminds us that while life changes constantly, our essence, values, and personal imprint remain unmistakably our own.

Butterfly — Celebrating Change.
Where every idea, every kitchen, and every individual leaves a mark.

Name: Worten España
Description:
Worten es una empresa de la distribución especializada en la venta de Electrodomésticos por Internet. La venta se realiza a través de la página web de Worten.es 


Nuestros compromisos están dirigidos a ofrecer la mejor tecnología al mejor precio: garantizamos la financiación 100% gracias a la tarjeta Worten, aseguramos la instalación y la retirada de los electrodomésticos, una devolución fácil hasta 100 días y un descuento del 5% permanente en todas las compras de dos o más grandes electrodomésticos.

Name: Create
Description:
CREATE es muchas cosas, pero sobre todo es una compañía joven creada por jóvenes apasionados por el diseño, la  innovación, la tecnología y con el objetivo de mejorar y simplificar el día a día de nuestros clientes a través de productos únicos y accesibles para todo el mundo.

Somos un equipo que se mueve, se adapta y crece al mismo ritmo que nuestros clientes, que son el eje central de nuestro negocio. Buscamos perfiles que compartan nuestro mismo espíritu: que cada uno se sienta orgulloso de su trabajo y que disfrute consiguiéndolo. 

Sólo eso hará posible conseguir nuestro último objetivo, ser la marca más deseada en cualquiera de los más de diez países donde operamos (por ahora).

Name: upliance.ai
Description:
India’s first AI powered home appliance brand. Our first upliance has been designed for beginners and pros to start cooking fantastic food without any stress or hassle. 

Designed in India, Built in India & Made in India. 

The upliance offers guided recipes on its touchscreen, a jar that uses presets for cooking tasks and an integrated weighing scale that makes cooking for 1 or 4 easy and simple. With thousands recipes at your fingertips and an upliance that does all the work, you no longer have an excuse to eat boring food! 

Stop eating boring food with upliance.

Name: The Washing Machine Project
Description:
We are The Washing Machine Project. 

The Washing Machine Project works to end the burden of hand washing clothes - a daily challenge faced by up to 50% of the global population, especially women and girls, in low-income, remote and displaced communities worldwide.

Based in the UK, The Washing Machine Project is a social enterprise working with corporate partnerships and collaborations, local organisations, charities, consultants and in-country partners in 13 countries to design, manufacture and distribute manual washing machines. The development of the Divya Washing Machine started in 2018 and since then, hundreds of machines have been distributed to households and communities, impacting 46,840 people as of August 2025. The Washing Machine Project and partners also provide support and advice to manual washing machine users to help them maintain the machines independently, whilst also providing grants and training for income related activities.

Our goal is to impact 1,000,000 people by 2030.

We can't do this alone - to find out how you can be part of an ecosystem committed to creating lasting change, that empowers women across the world then visit: https://www.thewashingmachineproject.org/contact-us

Through innovation, collaboration and care we will end the burden of hand washing clothes. One wash at a time.

Name: LG Colombia
Description:
Bienvenidos a la cuenta oficial de LG Colombia!

¿Quieres ver de lo que puede ser capaz tu hogar?
#LifesGood

Name: Alessa Industries Co.
Description:
Alessa Group was founded by Hamad Abdullah Alessa in 1935. Today the Alessa group is known as the Alessa Industrial Company (AIC). Alessa is an integrated group in the cooling business. It include distributing appliances, electronics and manufacturing refrigerators, freezers, air conditioners and air handling units, as well as contracting and installation of personnel and commercial air conditioners and air handling units. The international department in Alessa supplies the Middle East and Africa markets with a full range of air conditioners and other products, such as chest freezers, refrigerators. AIC has exclusive brand distributorships and manufacturing brand under license, marketing , service divisions and R&D. 

Currently AIC includes 3 Strategic Business Units; a trading Company, Hamad A. Alessa & Sons Co. (HAASCO), a major factory, Alessa for Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Co. (ARAC) and Al Essa Advanced Projects Co. (AAPC). At the corporate level, apart from these BUs, AIC has a corporate office that includes Support Divisions of Finance, Administration & HR, IT, and performance management office.

Name: Ferre | Femas Group
Description:
FERRE is a leading Turkish manufacturer of cooking appliances, operating with over 3,300 employees across 244,000 m² of production facilities.
FERRE specializes in OEM, ODM, private label, and SKD/CKD manufacturing, producing built-in ovens, hobs, cooker hoods, freestanding cookers, and compact appliances. All products are engineered in line with regional standards, market expectations, and everyday cooking habits.
Backed by strong in-house R&D and engineering teams, FERRE delivers configurable solutions in terms of dimensions, energy types, technical features, design, branding, and packaging.
With its high-capacity and flexible manufacturing structure, competitive price–performance balance, and long-term, trust-based partnerships, FERRE supports distributors, retailers, and brand owners in building sustainable and scalable product portfolios.
From Europe to the Middle East, Africa, CIS, and American markets, FERRE works closely with its business partners to develop strong and future-ready product ranges

Name: Artel Electronics
Description:
Artel Electronics LLC (Artel) is the largest home appliance and electronics manufacturer in Central Asia. 

Founded in 2011 with limited product lines, Artel has grown to employ around 10,000 people in all regions of Uzbekistan. 

Artel products are exported to over 20 countries, and the company is the regional partner of Samsung and Viessmann.

Name: Beko Italia
Description:
Beko Europe è tra le aziende di riferimento nel settore degli elettrodomestici. Beko è impegnata a migliorare la vita dei suoi consumatori attraverso una gamma diversificata di prodotti e soluzioni innovative e sostenibili. E' controllata al 75% da Beko B.V. e al 25% da Whirlpool Corporation. 
Come parte di Beko, riconosciuta come "l'azienda di elettrodomestici numero 1 in Europa"*, Beko Europe detiene un portfolio di 16 marchi  che forniscono elettrodomestici di qualità a milioni di famiglie in tutta Europa. 

In Italia commercializza i marchi Whirlpool*, Hotpoint-Ariston, Beko e Indesit. Forte di 70 anni di innovazione della casa madre, Beko Europe promuove la sostenibilità in casa, utilizzando tecnologie avanzate, risorse umane qualificate e forti capacità produttive  per contribuire ad un futuro migliore. 

Beko Europe progetta soluzioni che integrano funzionalità, sostenibilità e design ponendo al centro le esigenze dei consumatori con una gamma di brand e prodotti diversificati che coprono tutte le fasce di mercato.

*Licenza limitato a determinate giurisdizioni.  
**Fonte  Euromonitor International Limited, Edizione 2025 di Consumer Appliances , Beko Corp. Grandi Elettrodomestici secondo "Grandi Elettrodomestici", GBO vendita al dettaglio, dati 2024

Name: Vorwerk Italia
Description:
For 140 years, Vorwerk has been the world's leading direct sales company of household appliances of the highest quality, innovative technology and legendary durability.
With a turnover of 3.4 billion euros in 2021, the Vorwerk Group is today present in over 60 countries, with a sales force of over 100,000 appointees worldwide.
Present in Italy with Folletto since 1938, Vorwerk Italia today employs over 300 employees in the Milan headquarters and another 380 employees or collaborators in the Bimby and Folletto commercial networks present throughout the national territory.

In Italy, Vorwerk has been present since 1938 and with the two historic and iconic brands, Folletto and Bimby, excellent products that enter thousands of Italian homes every day and are presented with passion and competence by a motivated and passionate sales force.

Direct sales: ancient inspiration, contemporary processes

For millions of Italians Folletto is synonymous with home care. 
For 85 years, the famous Folletto home cleaning system has been distributed exclusively through the door-to-door sales channel: 4,000 agents who contact more than two and a half million families every year.

The iconic Bimby multifunction kitchen robot has been present in Italy since 1978. 
One of the most successful factors of Bimby is a direct sales force made up of competent and passionate professionals. Today in Italy there are 20,000 sales representatives who bring Bimby into customers' homes every day, organizing tasty demonstration moments.

Selling to the customer's home makes it possible to propose and recommend the most suitable solution for specific needs: a philosophy which demonstrates how Vorwerk's attention is focused on the needs of people in their home environments.

Name: Groupe SEB México
Description: Simplificamos la vida de nuestros consumidores en todo el mundo. Creando nuevos productos y servicios que mejoran la vida en el hogar, haciéndola más agradable, armoniosa y satisfactoria. Asimismo, ofrecemos nuevas soluciones que cubren sus necesidades actuales y se anticipan a sus aspiraciones y deseos.

Name: Midea India Home Appliances
Description: Midea India brings you an innovative line of home appliances, designed with care to enhance your quality of life, so you can #MakeYourselfAtHome

Name: Quooker Schweiz AG
Description:
Quooker - das Original. Als erster Kochend-Wasser-Hahn überhaupt hat es der Quooker vom kleinen Ort Ridderkerk in den Niederlanden in mittlerweile weitere 13 Länder geschafft. Der Hauptsitz in der Schweiz liegt heute in Kloten.
In den 1970er Jahren hatte Quooker-Erfinder Henri Peteri die geniale Eingebung, einen revolutionären Wasserhahn zu erfinden - und zwar einen, der die damals neumoderne Instantsuppe wirklich instant machen würde. Mit über 100°C heissem Wasser aus dem Wasserhahn ist es mittlerweile jedem möglich, diesen Luxus zu geniessen. Und frisch gebrühten Tee gibt es innerhalb von Sekunden.
Entdeckt mit uns weitere überraschende Verwendungsideen des Quookers und gewinnt exklusive Einblicke in unsere Quooker Fabrik und die Köpfe hinter dem Produkt.

Name: Briel
Description:
Briel is a portuguese brand of small appliances, specialized in espresso coffee machines for home and semi-professional use. The brand is born from the passion of brewing the perfect espresso, and defines itself as a unique blend of traditional craftmanship and modern technology.

We really love what we do. Briel is commited with sustainability, therefore our appliances are 100% repairable. Briel appliances are a lifetime lasting investment!

Name: Beko Nordic
Description:
Beko Nordic is a fast-growing company in the home appliance industry, offering a wide range of innovative and sustainable products.
An exciting portfolio of brands including Grundig, Beko, Blomberg, Whirlpool, Hotpoint, Arctic, Ariston, Leisure, Indesit, Bauknecht, Elektrabregenz, Privileg, Flavel, Altus, Ignis and Polar makes us increasingly attractive for consumers across the European and Nordic region. Beko Nordic aims to lead the way in sustainable innovation through advanced technology that motivates households around the world to live healthier and more sustainable lives.

The product range includes a large selection of cooking appliances – ovens, hobs, extractor hoods- as well as a range of refrigerators, dishwashers and washing machines. Beko Nordic also offer small appliances such as personal care, vacuum cleaners, coffee machines and more.

Beko Nordic is a part of Beko Europe, the leading home appliances business in Europe with 16 brands in the portfolio. Beko Europe has 11 production sites across Europe, with a production capacity of approximately 24 million white goods products per year.

Name: OUR GREENERY
Description:
## Pioneer Award Winner 2024 ##
Now for Tomorrow. Wir schaffen innovative & smarte Design-Lösungen, um jeden zum urbanen Farmer zu machen. 

Frei von Jahreszeiten, Pestiziden & langen Lieferketten.

Unser Sortiment:
 Der Tischgarten ist eine Keramik Schale inklusive Deckel und ermöglicht das Anbauen von Microgreens und weiteren Superfoods.

Ganz ohne Erde oder Gießen.

 Der Raumgarten ist ein vollautomatisiertes Smart Home Gerät. Mit ca. 5 kg Ernte im Monat auf kleinstem Raum haben wir eine der ertragreichsten smarten Indoor Farming Produkte weltweit entwickelt. 

Hunderte Sorten an Salaten, Kräutern & Microgreens können nun direkt zuhause bei euch oder in euren Kantinen, Restaurants oder Büros angebaut werden – mit Our Greenery.

Die nächsten Produkte werden in Richtung Pilze, Heilkräuter & Fermentierung gehen.

Name: FreezyBoy AG
Description:
FreezyBoy ist ein funktionaler Komposteimer für deine Küche. Die Zuger Innovation macht das Entsorgen von Lebensmittelresten einfach und erzeugt eine angenehme Atmosphäre in Ihrer Küche. 
Durch Kühlung des Bioabfalls auf -5 Grad C sorgt der einzigartige Biofreezer für ein sauberes, frisches und wohlriechendes Umfeld.

Name: Lavafields Group
Description:

Dalcq, ARB et Cuisidis.

La mise en commun des forces des trois structures permet d’investir encore plus dans le soutien de nos marques propres, la création de nouveaux produits et le développement de la distribution en Belgique, en France, en Europe et dans le monde !

Name: HOMA EUROPE
Description:

Always and only OEM.

Our dedication to "POP-exclusivity" compels us to deliver high-quality, energy-efficient products to a broad audience. 
We believe in making sustainability accessible to all.


Homa Europe is a Representative Office that operates non-transactional activities under the control and authority of Homa Appliances Co., Ltd.

Name: Vorwerk Türkiye
Description:
Vorwerk, 140 yıldır en yüksek kaliteye, yenilikçi teknolojiye ve dayanıklılığa sahip ev aletlerinin doğrudan satışında dünyanın lider konumunda köklü bir Alman şirketidir. Vorwerk Grup, dünya çapında 100.000'den fazla temsilciden oluşan satış gücüyle şu anda 60'tan fazla ülkede varlığını sürdürmektedir. 2017'den bu yana Türkiye’de Thermomix ile faaliyet gösteren Vorwerk Türkiye, bugün İstanbul’daki yönetim merkezinde 30'dan fazla çalışana ve Türkiye genelinde 1500’den fazla bağımsız satış danışmanına ekonomik ve sosyal hayatta daha güçlü bir rol üstlenmelerini sağlıyor.

Vorwerk, bugün Türkiye’de ikonik akıllı mutfak robotu kategorisinin lideri Thermomix'i her gün tüketicilerinin evlerine getiren ve lezzetli anlar sunarak Thermomix deneyimini yaşatan motive ve tutkulu bir satış gücüne sahip bağımsız satış danışmanları tarafından sunulan mükemmel bir ürün ile varlığını sürdürüyor. Thermomix markasının gücü memnun müşterilerden ve aynı zamanda ekiplerimizin yeteneği, tutkusu ve liderliğinden oluşmaktadır.

Name: Magiclick
Description:
Magiclick es una icónica marca argentina, que desde hace mas de seis décadas está presente en el mercado nacional. Actualmente, y desde hace más de 25 años, se dedica a la fabricación de una amplia gama de productos que comprenden las líneas de ventilación, calefacción, pequeños electrodomésticos, jardinería y bazar.

Desde Magiclick, trabajamos diariamente en conjunto y comprometidos con el mundo en el que nos rodea. Nos preocupamos y ocupamos por contribuir al medioambiente con medidas ecológicas y sustentables. 

Nuestros productos cumplen con las normas internacionales ISO que son certificadas a través del IQC.

Además, contamos con una amplia red de servicios técnicos a lo largo de todo el país.

Somos Tradición en el Hogar de los Argentinos.

Name: Evol Eletrodomésticos

Name: IRONFOLD CANADA
Description: Ironfold is a Canadian startup dedicated to revolutionizing the laundry experience. Our innovative apparatus irons and folds clothes simultaneously, bringing efficiency and convenience to households and businesses alike. Currently at Technology Readiness Level 6, our team is diligently advancing our technology to ensure it is efficient, reliable, and eco-friendly. ￼ With an estimated valuation of $1,750,000, Ironfold presents a promising opportunity for investors. ￼ Join us on our journey to transform the future of laundry.

Name: Beko AE
Description:
Our journey started in 1955...

55,000 employees throughout the world with its global operations through its subsidiaries in 58 countries and 46 production facilities in 14 countries (i.e. Türkiye, UK, Italy, Romania, Slovakia, Poland, South Africa, Russia, Pakistan, India, Bangladesh, Thailand, China and Egypt). Beko has 22 brands owned or used with a limited license (Arçelik, Beko, Whirlpool*, Grundig, Hotpoint, Arctic, Ariston*, Leisure, Indesit, Blomberg, Defy, Dawlance, Hitachi*, Voltas Beko, Singer*, ElektraBregenz, Flavel, Bauknecht, Privileg, Altus, Ignis, Polar). Beko became the largest white goods company in Europe with its market share (based on volumes) and reached a consolidated turnover of 8 billion Euros in 2023. Beko’s 31 R&D and Design Centers & Offices across the globe are home to over 2,300 researchers and hold more than 3,500 international registered patent applications to date. For the 5th consecutive year, the highest score in the DHP Household Durables industry (based on the results dated 27 October 2023)in the Dow Jones Sustainability Index of the S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment was achieved.** Beko’s vision is ‘Respecting the World, Respected Worldwide.’ 

*Licensee limited to certain jurisdictions.
**The data presented belongs to Arçelik A.Ş., a parent company of Beko.

Name: Beko Belgium
Description: Beko is the international household products brand of Arçelik, a multinational manufacturer operating with 12 brands and employing 45,000 people worldwide. Beko is one of the top 3 major home appliance brands in Europe and the fastest growing brand in the sector. Beko has for many years focused on healthy living, raising awareness and developing products that make healthy living possible and easy. Beko's brand mission is "healthy living on a healthy planet". Beko is committed to protecting the planet by designing and manufacturing energy-efficient products and investing in resource-efficient manufacturing.

Name: Niko Elektronik Indonesia
Description:
From humble beginnings, Niko Elektronik Indonesia has gone through restructuring and several brand refreshes to meet ever-changing market needs. However, the age old, tried and tested methods that make us relevant remain: consistently improving manufacturing and service efficiency, promoting workforce training and skills upgrading, and a concerted effort to tackle new challenges with fiery passion and a relentless spirit.

Our portfolio ranges from futuristic loudspeakers to home entertainment systems, elegant stovetops, quintessential rice cookers and everyday kitchenwares. We are committed to provide high quality consumer electrics, electronics and home appliances at competitive prices, certified by Standard National Indonesia (SNI) & ISO 9001:2008. 

Every individual here works with purpose. Be part of our dynamic team, as we journey on a mission to deliver world class standards to Indonesian households and beyond. Proudly made in Indonesia, delivered to the international stage.

Niko Elektronik Indonesia is an equal opportunity employer of all qualified individuals, regardless of race, religion, gender, or age.

Name: Al Jaber Trading Enterprises (L.L.C)
Description:
Al Jaber Trading Enterprises (L.L.C) is based in Dubai, UAE. 
Al Jaber is the exclusive distributor of two international household brands TOGNANA & ZOJIRUSHI in UAE and GCC countries.
We supply to all the Hypermarkets, Supermarkets, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cafes.

Name: SIDEME
Description:
Fondée en 1971, la société SIDEME a pour vocation l'import et la vente de gros électroménager, en provenance du monde entier, et en particulier d'Europe et d'Asie.

Riche d'une très longue expérience, SIDEME dispose d'une organisation, d'une structure technique, logistique et d'un savoir-faire professionnel pour servir ses clients autour de plusieurs thèmes dont le fil conducteur est la vente de produits aboutis, à partir d'un cahier des charges initial : ainsi, SIDEME réalise différentes gammes de produits de gros électroménager de qualité et compétitives sous marques de distribution ou à ses propres marques ; elle conçoit et met sur le marché une gamme complète de caves à vin (sous la marque Le Chai et Caviss) ; enfin elle distribue une gamme sophistiquée de cuisson sur le marché français sous la marque AMICA, issue du groupe AMICA.

Name: SAYL
Description: SAYL was born with the firm objective of offering restaurateurs new elements with which their clients make profitable their investments in hospitality machinery in the shortest possible time. For this reason, SAYL focuses its efforts on providing its display cases with a high degree of design, with integrative lines to help the restaurateur in the task of creating value for both their products and their premises.

Name: ASKO Americas

Name: Homend
Description:
2009 yılında kurulan Homend; küçük ev aletleri dünyasında yeni ihtiyaçları fark etmesinin üzerine, ürün kalitesini kendine özgü tasarım anlayışıyla birleştirerek tüketicilerine ulaştırmıştır. “Hayata hizmet eden anlamlı yenilikler ve fonksiyonel çözümler geliştirmek” misyonu ile ürün yelpazesini her geçen gün geliştiren Homend; 2020 yılında Karaca Grup bünyesine katılmıştır. 3 yılda ürün yelpazesini artırarak küçük ev aletleri kategorisinin önemli oyuncularından biri haline gelen Homend, günümüzde 9 farklı kategoride, 150 farklı ürününü tüketicileriyle buluşturmaktadır.

Homend Felsefesi: Anlamlı yenilikler ve özgün fonksiyonel çözümlerle hayata hizmet ediyoruz.Tasarımlarımızla her alanda insanı merkeze alıyoruz, empati yönü kuvvetli, çekici ve zevkli ürünler tasarlıyoruz.Doğru tanımlanmış fonksiyonlarla, doğru alanlarda yüksek performans gösteriyoruz. Değer yaratan hizmetlerimizle genel geçer standartları sürekli güncelliyoruz ve iyileştiriyoruz.

Homend Değerleri 

Güvenilir; Bir Homend ürünü aldığınızda, bize kendinizi, sevdiklerinizi, evinizi, sağlığınızı, hatta hayatınızı emanet ettiğinizi hiçbir zaman unutmayız. Bu güveni asla boşa çıkarmayız. Yenilikçi; Biz Homend’de tüm anlamlı yeniliklere kapımızı açık tutarız. Çünkü bizim için, ihtiyaçlarınızın gerisinde kalmak, evinizin, hayatınızın dışında kalmak demektir. Yalın; Yavanlıktan uzak bir yalınlığın herkesin ihtiyacı olduğuna inanırız. Hiçbir fazlalığı taşımayız, her zaman basite indirgeriz, her şeyi en yalın hale getiririz. Hümanist; Yazılı ve sözlü iletişimlerimizde insana değer veren yönümüzü gösteririz. Her zaman kolay anlaşılır, etkili ve insani yönü kuvvetli bir iletişim kurmak için çalışırız. Çekici; Evinize, hayatınıza, kendinize yakıştıracağınız ürünler tasarlamamız gerektiğini iyi biliriz. Estetik yönü güçlü, zevkle tasarlanmış bir görsellik sunarız.

Description:
Vals Elektronik,Türk elektrikli ev aletleri sektörünün deneyimli iki girişimcisi tarafından kurulmuş genç ve dinamik bir firmadır.

Üretim tesisimiz, Manisa Organize Sanayi Bölgesinde, bir zamanların efsane elektrikli vantilatör,ısıtıcı ve küçük ev aletleri üreticisi olan Raks’ın eski tesisleridir.

Tüm üretim alt yapısı, Ar-Ge , test laboratuarı, otomasyon sistemleri, kalıphane, know-how birikimi,rekabet avantajlarımızın önemli unsurlarıdır.

Kaliteli ürünlerin, ancak kaliteli personelle yapılabileceği gerçeğiyle, yüksek teknolojimizin konusunda deneyimli kalifiye personelle entegresi en büyük gücümüzdür.

9.000 m² kapalı olmak üzere toplam 12.000 m² alana kurulu olan tesisimizde, üretim iki ana bölümden oluşmaktadır.Bunlardan ilki vantilatör ,ısıtıcı ve küçük ev aletleri üretimi,diğeri ise farklı sektörler için çeşitli hassas plastik parçalar üretimidir.

Tesisimiz, vantilatör ve ısıtıcılar için toplam 1.000.000 adet / yıl, küçük ev aletleri için 600.000 adet/yıl,60 tondan 1.250 tona kadar basma kuvvetine sahip olan 40 adet plastik enjeksiyon ünitesiyle 5.000ton/yıl plastik işleme kapasitesine sahiptir.

Ürünlerimizi, iç ve dış pazarlarda VALS markamızın yanında güvenlik ve kalite unsurlarına önem veren markalar / firmalar için OEM, ODM, PL olarak sunmaktayız.

Şirketimizin ana felsefesi, kullanıcı güvenliğini ön planda tutarak,kaliteli, güvenilir ve insan sağlığından hiçbir ödün vermeyen ürünler üretmektir.

Name: ChangBERT
Description:
Leading the Charge in Electromagnetic Heating & Environmental-Friendly Technology
ChangBERT has always been at the forefront of induction electromagnetic heating technology, which we see as a key solution to the environmental challenges facing modern kitchens.
As a brand long dedicated to the commercial sector, it is our mission to enable people to cook in a faster, more efficient, more convenient and healthier way, while reducing carbon emissions and protecting the environment. Whether used in fast-paced commercial kitchens or at home, our cooktops are designed with energy efficiency in mind, ensuring that every meal is prepared with minimal environmental impact.

ChangBERT: Pioneering Innovation in the Commercial Kitchen
ChangBERT specializes in induction cooktop. Since 1999, we've been committed to the optimization and enhancement of electromagnetic heating technology to meet the needs and use of domestic and commercial. We have dedicated ourselves to providing solutions for both commercial kitchens and home cooks, elevating cooking experiences with precision, quality, and design.

 

Our Journey – From Commercial Excellence to Household Innovation
Understanding the need for high-powered, reliable, and safe equipment in busy kitchen environments, we recognized that these advancements could benefit not just the commercial market but also home kitchens. By 2003, we expanded our focus, bringing our cutting-edge technology into households across the globe.
From our roots in the commercial sector, ChangBERT became a trusted name in kitchens, providing innovative solutions for restaurant owners, chefs, and large-scale foodservice operations. Our commitment to safety and practicality, alongside our relentless pursuit of efficiency, has made ChangBERT a go-to brand for professionals who require high performance and sustainability in their kitchens.

Innovative, Sturdy, Reliable and Safe: The Cornerstone of ChangBERT’s Brand

Freshwater withdrawals have tripled over the last 50 years, and with the world's population growing by roughly 80 million people each year - it is evident that a solution is needed. Modern households and hospitality venues need a product that can:

- Work despite low water pressure
- Reduce water consumption
- Reduce limescale buildup
- Save money & energy at the same time

Enter FTT CRYSTAL WATER handshower & shower head, a revolutionary, patented product utilizing advanced technology!

UNIQUE FEATURES FOR BETTER LIVING

We have designed, developed and manufactured a cost-effective, innovative, and environmentally conscientious solution for bathrooms, boating a sustainable and effective lifecycle.

LOWER WATER BILLS
NO DRIPPING - FULL SPRAY
SAME QUANTITY OF WATER - MORE SHOWERS

At the heart of everything is H2Q, our revolutionary device placed inside the Crystal Water handshower & shower head. It's patented designs allows it to affect the physical parameters of water without changing its chemical composition. Independent laboratory research has proven that H2Q significantly increases the biological quality of water thanks to its improved molecular dynamics technology.

The Benefits You Can Experience:

ECONOMY: Save money - lower bills
ENERGY: Save water - reduce consumption
ECOLOGY: Oxygenation of water improves its biological quality

Crystal Water is extremely efficient in low water pressure conditions, allowing full jet showers with pressure as low as 0.5 Bar

It enables water savings at maximum flow, saving up to 75% of water

Crystal Water combats limescale

The oxygenization effect creates a pleasant feeling of vitality which favorably affects the quality of skin and hair

Description:
A nossa máquina de raclette é uma peça de tecnologia culinária que tem revolucionado o modo como cozinhas profissionais tratam o derretimento do queijo. Graças ao seu design inteligente, a máquina concentra o calor em uma resistência próxima ao queijo, o que permite que o calor seja distribuído de maneira homogênea. Isso é crucial porque derreter o queijo uniformemente evita aquelas partes queimadas indesejadas e mantém a textura do queijo suave e convidativa. 
E o queijo raclette é um tipo de queijo que vem da Suíça e é conhecido por derreter muito bem. Este queijo traz um gosto especial para qualquer prato!

Description:
Transform your business or event space with the timeless allure of handcrafted brass décor. At Luxecascade, we specialize in creating bespoke tableware and home décor pieces for luxury hotels, event planners, boutique retailers, and more. Our artisanal approach and flexible bulk ordering options allow you to add a touch of elegance and authenticity to every setting.

Why Handcrafted Pieces? The Art of Timeless Craftsmanship
Each piece at Luxecascade is more than just a product; it's a story of craftsmanship, care, and tradition. When you choose handcrafted brass décor, you're choosing to bring artistry into your space. Here’s why our handmade pieces stand out:
•	Uniqueness in Every Piece: Unlike mass-produced items, our handcrafted pieces carry the unique touch of the artisan’s hand. Small variations in design, shape, or texture make each product one-of-a-kind, perfect for businesses seeking exclusivity.
•	Generational Skill: Our craftsmen use time-honored techniques passed down through generations, ensuring that every piece is crafted with precision, care, and attention to detail. This rich heritage imbues our products with a sense of history and artistry, adding value to any setting.
•	Personalization & Customization: When you order in bulk with us, you’re not just buying products—you’re co-creating them. We work with you to develop custom designs, engravings, or logos that reflect your brand's identity, be it for luxury hotels, event venues, or upscale retailers. Our artisans can customize products to your specifications, ensuring a unique and personalized experience for your guests or customers.

Name: Ekosan Evye
Description:
1982 yılından bu yana evye, otomotiv, beyaz eşya, mutfak gereçleri gibi sektörlere hidrolik pres, özel makineler ve kalıplar yapmaktayız. Ayrıca yurt dışında farklı ülkelerde ve yurt içinde evye, otomotiv, beyaz eşya tesisleri kurmuş bulunuyoruz. 2002 yılında başladığımız paslanmaz evye imalatımızda, yılların kazandırdığı tecrübeyi TÜBİTAK ve üniversiteler ile birleştirip sektöre yeni kazanımlar yapıyoruz.

İlkelerimiz; kaliteli ürün,müşteri memnuniyeti ve bol ürün çeşidi. Bu doğrultu da kendi makinemizi ve kalıbımızı yapmaktayız. 2015 yılında kurmuş olduğumuz firmamıza ait fabrikamız da entegre tesisleşmemi-zi tamamlayarak hem paslanmaz çelik evye üretimine hemde hidrolik pres imalatına devam etmekteyiz.

Description:

yerli ve milli küçük ev aletleri markasıdır.



Kurulduğu günden bu yana hedeflerini her zaman bir üst seviyeye taşıyan Musullu, yurt içi ve yurt dışı pazarına katma değer ve istihdam sağlayarak global ölçekte fayda sağlayarak gelişerek büyümeye ve ‘’daima daha iyisi’’ ilkesiyle müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.



Kendi segmentinin en kaliteli profesyonel ürünlerini, üretimden dağıtıma ve teknik servis hizmetlerine kadar Musullu güvencesi ile “Alan da, satan da mutlu” sloganıyla perakende pazarına sunmaktadır.

Name: PT AINI HEATING TECHNOLOGY
Description:
AINI Group was founded in 1996 and is located in the Xingtan High-Tech Industrial Zone of Shunde, Guangdong—known as the "Capital of Home Appliances" in China. The company occupies 20 acres of land, with a factory area of 40,000 square meters. It is recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise, specializing in products such as instant electric water heaters, heat pump water heaters, low-temperature heating heat pumps, and heat pump pool heaters.

The group includes four subsidiary companies:

Guangdong AINI Intelligent Home Appliance Manufacturing Co., Ltd.

Guangdong Nuanwu Technology Co., Ltd.

Guangdong Youjia Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.

Foshan Huini Metal Products Co., Ltd.

The group employs over 500 staff members.

AINI Group has a professional R&D team of nearly 100 people and holds over 35 patents in heat pump and HVAC technology, with more than 100 authorized patents in various categories. It operates multiple national-level laboratories, including the largest 50HP lab capable of testing heat pumps up to 200kW, as well as a 10HP lab, acoustic lab, and a comprehensive testing center, all currently in operation.

The company’s products have received numerous international design awards such as the German Red Dot Award, Japan Good Design Award, iF Design Award, and Korea Good Design (GD) Award. AINI Group is recognized as a "Star Enterprise" in Shunde District and has passed ISO 9001 Quality Management Certification, North American ETL Safety Certification, EU CB Certification, EU CE Electrical Safety Certification, and several national certifications.

AINI Group maintains close business relationships with well-known companies in more than 50 countries and regions worldwide, and its products are popular across Europe, North America, and beyond—highly regarded and loved by consumers.

Name: Respiro System
Description:
Respiro System - Purificazione dell'aria per ambienti sicuri e salubri

Respiro System è una linea di prodotti innovativi per la purificazione dell'aria, sviluppata da Colledani S.r.l., azienda leader internazionale con oltre trent'anni di esperienza nel settore dei pavimenti in resina. Consapevole dell'importanza cruciale della qualità dell'aria per la salute fisica e mentale, Respiro System offre soluzioni avanzate per eliminare sostanze dannose dall'ambiente domestico e professionale.

L'azienda riconosce che l'aria è la principale fonte di energia vitale: l'ossigeno assorbito dai polmoni alimenta ogni cellula del corpo, garantendo energia per funzioni cognitive, muscolari e digestive. Una buona ossigenazione supporta le funzioni vitali, promuove salute e benessere in tutte le fasi della vita, riducendo ansia e stress.

Tecnologie innovative

La linea Respiro System utilizza due tecnologie avanzate e collaudate:

Ozono: Purifica eliminando fino al 99,98% di batteri, virus e odori, garantendo aria fresca senza residui chimici nocivi. È una soluzione naturale e altamente efficace per sanitizzare gli spazi.

Raggi UV: Distruggono continuamente virus, batteri e allergeni, assicurando aria pulita e sicura. La tecnologia UV offre un'azione costante e affidabile nel tempo.

Prodotti disponibili

La gamma produttiva include diverse soluzioni:

    Respiro Tower: soluzione professionale per la produzione di acqua ozonizzata
    Respiro Cubo: purificatore compatto e versatile
    Respiro Small: versione ridotta per spazi limitati
    Respiro Wash: sistema specifico per il trattamento dell'acqua

Description:
Piramit Madeni Eşya 10 yılı aşan üretimi boyunca sahip olduğu bilgi ve tecrübeyi, siz değerli müşterileri ile paylaşmanın heyecanını duyar. Kurulduğumuz günden itibaren Madeni Eşya konusunda üretim yapan uzman kadroya sahip olan şirketimiz; Kurutmalık, Masa, Sandalye, Askılık, Portmanto Askı, Portatif Gardrop ürünleri 3000²’lik fabrikamızda siz değerli müşterilerimizin kullanımına sunuyoruz. Orta ölçekli bir işletme olmamıza rağmen ilk andan itibaren kaliteye verdiğimiz önem ve zoru başarma azmimiz sayesinde kısa sürede kendi sektöründe tanınmış bir firma haline geldik. Firmamızın değişmez prensipleri daima kalite, hizmet, zamanında teslim ve uygun fiyat olmuştur. Üretimde başarı ve sürekliliğin teminatı hizmette dürüstlük ve kalitedir prensibiyle çalışan Piramit Madeni Eşya, gösterdiğiniz yakın ilgi ve desteğinizden ötürü teşekkür ederek sizlere bugün ve gelecekte hizmet vermeye devam edeceğiz.

Vizyonumuz:
Müşterilerimiz için gelişen teknolojilerin takipçisi olup, müşteri memnuniyetine yönelik yeniliklerin sürekli uygulayıcısı olmak.

Misyonumuz:
Hizmet anlayışı ve kalite standartlarını artırarak lider firma olma yönünde emin adımlarla yürümek, çözüm ortağı olarak, beklentilerin üzerinde müşteri memnuniyeti sağlamak.

Name: CEFACD

Description:
Indian kitchens are messy, emotional, expensive to mismanage.
We’re building the kitchen operating system that quietly cuts waste, saves money and stress.

StorNūAge is building the next generation of smart storage and kitchen intelligence for modern Indian homes. We focus on a simple, everyday problem: food gets forgotten, shelves stay cluttered, and we waste money on groceries we already had.

Our products combine thoughtfully designed containers, sensors and a clean, intuitive app to help you know what’s in your kitchen, what’s going bad soon, and what you can cook from it. Less waste, fewer “forgot-back-somewhere” moments, and more control over the heart of your home.

Over time, StorNūAge aims to become the smart layer sitting over your containers, fridge and grocery apps, helping households store better, spend smarter and live more sustainably.

We’re a young, product-first team at the intersection of hardware, AI and everyday life, and we’re just getting started. The world is transforming ,why should your kitchen left behind.

Name: Foshan Yazhe Electric Appliance Co.Ltd
Description:
Foshan Yazhe Electric Appliance Co., Ltd., established in 2009 and located in the Shunde High-Tech Development Zone in Foshan, Guangdong, is a national high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, production, and sales. The company specializes in two major sectors: micro motors and mid-to-high-end small household appliances.

With an independent R&D team, the company is capable of designing innovative products tailored to customer needs. Over more than a decade, Yazhe has accumulated extensive experience in the development and manufacturing of micro motors and small appliances, continuously expanding its product range. It is committed to developing a diversified series of motors widely used in various household appliances. In the field of mid-to-high-end electric small appliances, the company holds a leading technical position and has obtained numerous domestic and international patents for inventions and utility models.

Yazhe operates a modern 4,000-square-meter production facility with a fully automated mold injection workshop, with an annual output of 2 million small appliances and 3-4 million motors. With over 14 years of OEM/ODM experience, the company strictly adheres to the ISO9001 quality management system and has been certified by third-party quality systems. All products meet international standards and are certified by CE, CB, ROHS, LFGB, FCC, and FDA. Our products are exported to Europe, America, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa, and are highly trusted and praised by our customers.

Name: MOCTOR GmbH
Description:
Moctor ist ein in Deutschland gegründetes Unternehmen, dass sich auf die Herstellung und den Vertrieb von energieeffizienten Produkten spezialisiert hat.
Das Ziel von Moctor ist es, nur Produkte in höchster Qualität und mit dem höchsten Energieeffizienzstandard anzubieten.
Dabei setzen wir auf Nachhaltigkeit und den Schutz der Umwelt und Ressourcen. Mit unserer Expertise und Erfahrung trägt moctor somit aktiv dazu bei, dass die Energiewende vorangetrieben wird und ein nachhaltiger Umgang mit Ressourcen gefördert wird.

Moctor bietet eine breite Palette an Produkten an, darunter Haushaltsgeräte wie Kühlschränke, Waschmaschinen und Geschirrspüler, aber auch Wärmepumpentrockner.
Alle Produkte werden sorgfältig getestet und zertifiziert, um sicherzustellen, dass sie den höchsten Energieeffizienzstandards entsprechen und somit einen minimalen Verbrauch an Energie und Ressourcen gewährleisten.

Darüber hinaus legt Moctor großen Wert auf eine transparente und verantwortungsvolle Produktion. Das Unternehmen setzt auf erneuerbare Energien und recycelbare Materialien bei der Herstellung seiner Produkte, um die Umweltbelastung so gering wie möglich zu halten.

Moctor ist ein Vorreiter in Sachen Energiewende und Nachhaltigkeit und arbeitet kontinuierlich daran, seine Produkte und Prozesse zu optimieren, um einen positiven Beitrag zu einer nachhaltigen Zukunft zu leisten.

Name: Airdog Air Purifier Manufacturer
Description: Airdog is a leading air purifier brand founded by a group of technology experts and entrepreneurs from Silicon Valley in 2007. Our founder Dr.Ran was inspired by Steve Jobs with his pursuit of perfection and the inspiring story of legend engineer Nikola Tesla. As a keen engineer, his inner passion has been calling on him to create a "different" air purifier" considering the increasing global air pollution and the drawbacks of HEPA filters. During the worst days of PM2.5 ourbreaks in China, Airdog proved its efficiency and huge potentials in improving indoor air qualities. In 2010, Airdog moved its production line to China in order to fulfill the increasing global needs on air purifiers. Today, our factory covers more than 50,000 square meters with over 70 employees, and our China branch office with over 40 employees. Today, proudly we present the world's most advanced ionic air purifiers with zero-waste and reusable design, which turely brings the benifits and convenience of technology to everyone. Airdog sets users free from the captivity of the endless purchase cycle of HEPA filters and protects people and their beloved ones from the risks of viruses and other airborne pollutants. Our goal is to share this waste-free and high-efficient way of air purifying solution to every corner in the world that suffers from air pollutions. We warmly welcome global buyers who share the same insights to work with us and improve the indoor air qualities in their countries. Together we can create a better world with better air.

Name: Art Practica
Description:
Nestled in the picturesque countryside near the majestic Rtanj Mountain, Art Practica is a small, sustainable business dedicated to creating functional works of art for your kitchen – our unique, handmade cutting boards crafted from recycled wood.

Our Story:

Founded with a passion for both craftsmanship and environmental stewardship, Art Practica emerged as a humble workshop on the outskirts of the serene Rtanj region. Surrounded by nature's beauty, we found inspiration in the landscapes that envelop us and a commitment to preserving our planet's resources.

Crafting Excellence:

At Art Practica, we believe in the beauty of simplicity and the elegance of sustainability. Each cutting board we produce is a testament to our dedication to quality craftsmanship. Our artisans handpick reclaimed wood, breathing new life into forgotten materials, and transform them into functional works of art.

Unique Designs:

No two cutting boards are alike at Art Practica. We take pride in creating distinct pieces that reflect the individuality of the wood we use. From the rich history embedded in each grain to the unique patterns that tell a story of their own, our cutting boards are a celebration of nature's diversity.

Sustainability at Heart:

We are committed to reducing our ecological footprint. By using recycled wood, we not only contribute to the conservation of our forests but also showcase the inherent beauty of materials that have stood the test of time. Our dedication to sustainability extends to every aspect of our business – from production to packaging.

Local Roots, Global Impact:

While our workshop is firmly rooted in the countryside near Rtanj Mountain, our impact reaches far beyond. We believe in supporting local economies and communities, fostering a sense of connection between our customers and the landscapes that inspire us.

Art Practica invites you to join us on a journey towards a more sustainable and beautiful world and explore our collection.

Description:
Για περισσότερα από 140 χρόνια, η Vorwerk αποτελεί μια οικογενειακή εταιρεία με διεθνή δραστηριότητα, με αποστολή τη βελτίωση της καθημερινής ζωής σε κάθε χώρο που αποκαλούμε σπίτι. Τα προϊόντα και οι υπηρεσίες μας ξεχωρίζουν για την υψηλή τους ποιότητα, αλλά και για το ανθρώπινο στοιχείο που τα χαρακτηρίζει, τόσο στον τρόπο που σχεδιάζονται και διατίθενται όσο και στον τρόπο που χρησιμοποιούνται.
 
Η Vorwerk είναι η νούμερο ένα εταιρεία άμεσων πωλήσεων (direct sales) στην Ευρώπη και παγκόσμιος ηγέτης στις άμεσες πωλήσεις οικιακών συσκευών υψηλής ποιότητας.
 
Σήμερα, περισσότεροι από 108.000 άνθρωποι σε περισσότερες από 60 χώρες εργάζονται για τη Vorwerk, συμβάλλοντας στη δημιουργία συνολικού κύκλου εργασιών 3,17 δισεκατομμυρίων ευρώ (χωρίς φόρο κύκλου εργασιών, 2024).
 
Το χαρτοφυλάκιο των προϊόντων μας περιλαμβάνει το Thermomix / Bimby, καθώς και τις ηλεκτρικές σκούπες Kobold / Folletto. Τα προϊόντα αυτά τα αναπτύσσουμε, τα κατασκευάζουμε και τα διαθέτουμε εμείς, με επιτυχία, σε παγκόσμιο επίπεδο. Στην οικογένεια της Vorwerk ανήκουν επίσης ο όμιλος akf και η Nexaro.

Name: DALCQ SA
Description:
Dalcq est une société belge, active dans l’électroménager depuis près de 50 ans. 
 
Au début des années 70, son fondateur lance la marque Frifri en Belgique en proposant les premières friteuses à zone froide aux particuliers. 

D’innovations en brevets, de rachats en créations de produits, les marques Frifri et Dejelin sont nées et se sont développées.

Frifri propose des friteuses haut de gamme produites en Belgique, des gaufriers semi-professionnels conçus en Belgique, une chocolatière créée et fabriquée en Belgique et bien d’autres produits de qualité. 

Dejelin offre un cuiseur vapeur professionnel pour les particuliers pensé et créé en Belgique, des déshydrateurs ou encore des extracteurs de jus de grande qualité à des prix accessibles. 

En 2012, Dalcq décide de compléter son offre et développe une seconde activité : la distribution de marques internationales de grande qualité dans le petit électroménager, ce qui lui permet alors de combler tous les besoins de ses clients ! 

Ainsi, Omega, Vitamix, Beurer, Bissell, Boneco, Riviera&Bar, Ariete, etc. sont venus compléter l’assortiment .

GRAM er stadig kendt for køl og frys, men sælger og markedsfører i dag et fuldt sortiment af hvidevarer til private husholdninger i Danmark, Norge, Sverige og Finland. GRAM er desuden kendt for at udvikle produkter, der glæder forbrugerne i dagligdagen og dermed bidrager til positive oplevelser i køkkenet.

GRAM fokuserer på kvalitet og holdbarhed og på at udvikle miljørigtige og funktionelle hvidevarer i tidløst Skandinavisk klassisk design.

Name: GÜNEŞ  A. Ş.
Description:
Güneş A.Ş. olarak 1984 yılından bu yana sektördeki birikim ve deneyimimizle öne çıkarak faaliyet gösteriyoruz. Gebze, Eskişehir ve Şekerpınar’da bulunan     tesislerimizde  toplam 50.000 m² üretim alanına sahibiz.

Küçük Ev Aletleri sektörüne  tasarımdan paketlemeye komple çözüm ortağı olarak yıllık 2 milyon bitmiş ürün sunmaktayız. Ayrıca Otomotiv, beyaz eşya, ve vitrifiye sektörlerine de  kalıp, plastik parça ve gruplama hizmetleri vermekteyiz. 

Güneş A.Ş. olarak geleceği öngörebilen, yeniliklere açık ve değişime uyum sağlamayı ilke edinen bir kuruluşuz. Temel amacımız, mevcut ve potansiyel müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini sağlamak ve sürdürmek için kalite, maliyet ve zaman optimizasyonunu ön planda tutarak bu prensipler doğrultusunda müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmak ve sürekli gelişmektir. Verimli, izlenebilir, sürdürülebilir üretim ve sağlıklı depo yönetimi için bütünleşik ERP ve sahadan veri toplama sistemleri kullanmaktayız.
 Güneş A.Ş., we have been operating since 1984, standing out with our knowledge and experience in the sector. We have a total production area of 50.000 m² in our facilities located in Gebze, Eskişehir and Şekerpınar.

We offer 2 million finished products annually to the Small Home Appliances sector as a complete solution partner from design to packaging. We also provide mold, plastic parts and grouping services to the automotive, white goods and sanitary ware sectors. 

As Güneş A.Ş., we are an organization that foresees the future, is open to innovations and adopts the principle of adapting to change. Our main goal is to provide the best service to our customers and to continuously improve in line with these principles by prioritizing quality, cost and time optimization in order to ensure and maintain the satisfaction of our existing and potential customers. We use integrated ERP and field data collection systems for efficient, traceable, sustainable production and healthy warehouse management.

Name: Majesty Holdings Co.,Ltd
Description:
广东美捷时控股股份有限公司是一家立足于包装领域的股份制企业，致力于研发、设计、制造及销售气雾剂阀门、分配泵、喷雾泵、盖子、吸入给药装置等日化品及医药用品分配装置；拥有各类专利410多项，为客户提供技术解决方案及产品服务。在全球多个国家拥有分支机构，与多个国家和地区有商业往来。
公司成立于2004年，主厂区位于广东省中山市火炬开发区健康路21号，占地面积超过8万平方米，建筑面积接近10万平方米；拥有当今先进的生产及检测设备、独立的实验室及工程中心；通过了中国药品包装用材料和容器认证并获得注册证（Ⅰ类）；通过了ISO9001、ISO14001、ISO45001、ISO50001、ISO13485及BRCGS-PM等体系认证；同时与国内多所大学建立了长期的合作关系。
我们将秉承持续改进、实干创新的理念，不断满足客户在质量、成本及交期上的需求，获得更多的客户认同及赞誉，进一步提升公司的影响力,为社会创造更大价值。

Majesty Holdings Co., Ltd. is a wholly owned company dedicated to the packaging industry. Majesty is committed to research & develop, design, manufacturing & distribution of daily chemical products and medical supplies. These include aerosol valves, dispensing pumps, mist sprayers, spray caps and inhalation drug delivery devices. Majesty has obtained more than 410 kinds of patents, offering technical solutions and product services to customers. It has branches in many countries and conducts business with customers who are located in many countries and regions.

Majesty Holdings Co., Ltd. history was founded in 2004 and main factory located in No. 21 Health Road, Torch Development District, Zhongshan City, Guangdong Province, China. Majesty’s plant covers an area more than 80,000 square meters while the facility covers about 100,000 square meters. Majesty also has advanced manufacturing equipment and production facility. Name: Orbis Mertig SAIC
Description:
En1921 el Sr. Roberto Mertig llega a la Argentina proveniente de Alemania y funda la empresa Orbis.
En poco tiempo, la empresa desarrolla nuevas tecnologías concebidas en principio para el gas propano y luego para el gas natural. Como pionera del rubro, obtenemos el registro N°001 en la lista de fabricantes argentinos de artefactos a gas.
Desde los inicios mantenemos una filosofía empresarial orientada siempre a la máxima calidad de nuestros productos y con un profundo sentido social. 
Con el transcurso del tiempo, además del gas, extendimos la tecnología a artefactos eléctricos y, desde hace algunos años, ampliamos a equipos de energía solar apuntados a la incipiente necesidad y demanda por energías alternativas.
A partir de 1970, Orbis pasó a ser presidida por la segunda generación del fundador que, continuando con la filosofía de excelencia en el desarrollo de sus productos, inversión constante en tecnología y capacitación permanente de su personal, se inició en el camino de la mejora continua. En el año 1999 obtuvimos la certificación ISO 9000. La norma se fue validando en cada auditoría y así fue como se logró la certificación de calidad ISO 9001 : 2015.
Desde el 2013, la empresa es presidida por la tercera generación. Sigue siendo una empresa con una significativa participación en el mercado de artefactos de cocción, calentamiento de agua sanitaria y calefacción. Dicha participación se hace posible a través de las dos plantas industriales que posee en la Argentina; una en Villa Adelina (Buenos Aires) y la otra en Fraga (San Luis).
Estas plantas nos permiten competir tanto en le mercado local como también extenderse en el exterior. Si bien quedó lejos aquel inicio de la producción a finales de la década del 20, continuamos sustentando los mismos principios éticos y objetivos del bien común que nos han regido.

Name: Angel Drinking Water Industrial Group Corporation
Description:
Angel was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province. Brand positioning high-end water purification expert, focus on the field of clean drinking water for 35 years, signed the international actress Gong Li as its global brand spokesperson. Currently, Angel products have been sold in 65 countries around the world.
Over the past 35 years, Angel has always insisted on independent creation and technological innovation, and constantly led the industry quality upgrading. The first water purifier was developed in 1988, and the first water dispenser in 1993, promoting the development of China's clean drinking water industry. In 2014, Angel launched high-end water purifier A6 equipped with "Dow filter element originally imported from the United States", leading the quality upgrade of the industry. 2015 A6 water purifier industry single product sales leading. In 2019, Angel launched self-developed long-lasting reverse osmosis filter element. In 2020, Angel Environmental Science and Technology Wisdom Park was completed, covering an area of over 600,000 square meters, and can achieve an annual output of 10 million (sets) of net drinking water products. In the same year, Angel A7 Series Glory was released to open the era of water purifiers. In 2021, Angel established a joint Water purification laboratory with Aerospace Biology to jointly research space water purification technology. In 2022, Angel launched the high-end whole house water purification series X-Tech, which won the permanent collection of the Centro Pecci Pratoi Museum in Italy; In the same year, Angel signed a contract with Hainan Aerospace, officially becoming China's aerospace technology application partner.
At present, Angel has obtained 911 patents, participated in the formulation of 16 national and industrial standards, and is the leader of the domestic water purifier industry. Its self-developed long-lasting reverse osmosis membrane broke the foreign technology monopoly

Với gần 100 năm đã tạo ra sự khác biệt so với các đối thủ cạnh tranh bằng cách đạt được nhiều bước đột phá ở Thổ Nhĩ Kỳ, từ công nghiệp hóa đến toàn cầu hóa, giữ vững vị trí tập đoàn hàng đầu Thổ Nhĩ Kì

 Các sản phẩm của Beko cung cấp cho người tiêu dùng giải pháp tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức cũng như chăm sóc sức khỏe, từ đó có thể tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc quý giá cho bản thân và gia đình.
 
Hơn 60 năm hình thành và phát triển, dù đáp ứng nhu cầu nào, sản phẩm của Beko giữ vai trò là “bạn đồng hành” của người tiêu dùng trên hành trình hướng đến cuộc sống tốt đẹp hơn, giúp họ không bỏ lỡ hay trì hoãn những thói quen lành mạnh trước nhịp sống bận rộn. Bằng cách nỗ lực sáng chế ra những công nghệ “Chăm sóc sức khỏe chuẩn Âu”, Beko kỳ vọng hỗ trợ người dùng xây dựng lối sống khỏe, bắt đầu từ những thói quen nhỏ, dễ thực hiện hàng ngày.

We willen een merk zijn dat mensen inspireert en begeleidt naar een gezondere levensstijl, door het aanbieden van producten die praktisch zijn, esthetisch aantrekkelijk en van hoge kwaliteit. Onze visie is om marktleider te worden in Europa, waarbij we een breed scala aan unieke keukenproducten aanbieden die mensen helpen hun dagelijkse uitdagingen in de keuken te overwinnen. Safecourt Kitchen wil niet alleen producten verkopen, maar ook een gemeenschap opbouwen die onze passie voor gezond koken en een actieve levensstijl deelt. Description:
ri-generation è un’idea nata da Astelav, azienda familiare attiva dal 1963 e uno dei principali distributori europei di ricambi per elettrodomestici. 

La nostra missione è rigenerare elettrodomestici dismessi, riducendo l'impatto ambientale e promuovendo l'economia circolare. 

Vogliamo diventare un modello sostenibile nella rigenerazione degli elettrodomestici, limitando il carbon footprint dei consumatori. Intercettare, rigenerare e ricondizionare elettrodomestici è la nostra passione.

Ci impegniamo ogni giorno a ridurre l'impatto dei RAEE (rifiuti di apparecchiature elettriche ed elettroniche) sensibilizzando le persone verso un mondo più pulito, consapevole e sostenibile. Inoltre, ci adoperiamo per aiutare persone in difficoltà a integrarsi all'interno della società, generando posti di lavoro e offrendo loro abilità tecniche e formazione continua.

Ad oggi, il nostro team è composto da esperti professionisti, che grazie alla profonda conoscenza tecnica, insegnano un mestiere a chi ne ha più bisogno. Siamo orgogliosi di supportare queste persone offrendo loro un impiego e integrazione all’interno della società.

Grazie alla nostro forte know how e alla pluriennale esperienza nel campo della rigenerazione degli elettrodomestici, siamo pronti ad affrontare qualsiasi sfida.

Siamo ri-generation: ri-pensiamo, ri-generiamo, ri-diamo valore alle cose.

Description:
Sistem filtriranja HYLA EST temelji na osupljivem naravnem pojavu – gejzirju. Vsesani zrak skupaj s prašnimi delci ustvari navzgor, proti separatorju, usmerjen tok vode – HYLA gejzir. Na ta način se s pomočjo separatorja prašni delci ujamejo v vodo, kar zagotavlja učinkovito čiščenje zraka.
Edinstvena mednarodno patentno zaščitena tehnična rešitev centrifugalnega separatorja zagotavlja, da je HYLA vrhunski izdelek.

HYLA EST is distinguished by the unique and globally patented separator technology. This ingenious technological solution is inspired by a fascinating natural phenomenon – the geyser – and is the essence of HYLA EST filtration system.
As the air and dust enter the HYLA System, the separator creates an upward stream of water. The geyser effect assures optimized filtration that thoroughly washes the air and returns it clean into your home.
In the production of the HYLA System we only use high-quality materials.

Quooker, fundado en 1970 en los Países Bajos, ha revolucionado la industria de la cocina con su sistemas que proporcionan, de forma instantánea, agua hirviendo y agua filtrada refrigerada con y sin gas, previamente filtrada. 

Quooker ofrece una solución completa, combinando comodidad, salud y sostenibilidad.

· Comodidad: gracias a su innovador sistema, ya no es necesario esperar a que el agua hierva para preparar un té o cocinar, ni tampoco transportar y almacenar botellas de plástico. 

· Salud y bienestar: con Quooker se puede disfrutar de una dieta más sana ya que permite hervir y cocinar al vapor de forma más fácil, preparar infusiones saludables al instante y beber agua de la mejor calidad directamente desde el grifo.

· Sostenibilidad: hervir agua con Quooker es mucho más eficiente que con un sistema tradicional, permitiendo ahorrar agua y energía. Además, el Quooker CUBE ofrece agua filtrada refrigerada y con gas, eliminando así la necesidad de usar envases y generar residuos. 

Con sede en Barcelona, estamos presentes en España, Andorra y Gibraltar desde 2022, con equipos comerciales y técnicos propios que nos permiten ofrecer el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes.

Name: Tập Đoàn Sơn Hà Xanh - SHG Group
Description:
Sơn Hà Xanh - Công nghệ xanh vì cuộc sống xanh
SHG - Green Tech For Green Life
Những năm tháng đóng góp vào quá trình phát triển đất nước cho Sơn Hà Xanh niềm tin rằng, bất kì người dân Việt Nam nào cũng xứng đáng được hưởng dụng một cuộc sống Xanh - Sạch - Hiện đại. Việc đặt nền móng trong việc ứng dụng giải pháp công nghệ Xanh và năng lượng tái tạo vào sản phẩm - dịch vụ không chỉ là việc nên làm, cần làm mà nó trở thành trách nhiệm cao cả và khát vọng của một tập đoàn được người tiêu dùng Việt tín nhiệm, tin tưởng, sử dụng trong suốt hơn 20 năm xây dựng và hình thành. Có thể nói trong suốt những năm hội nhập và phát triển của đất nước, nhiều thế hệ “mái nhà Việt” gắn liền với các sản phẩm mang thương hiệu Toàn Thắng - thuộc Tập đoàn Sơn Hà. Và cho đến tận thời điểm hiện tại, những sản phẩm và dịch vụ này vẫn đang và sẽ gắn bó bền vững với người Việt.

Ngày 18 tháng 5 năm 2021, Công ty Cổ phần Toàn Thắng chính thức đổi tên thành Công ty Cổ phần Tập đoàn Sơn Hà Xanh - Son Ha Green Group JSC (SHG Group). Đồng thời tiến hành thay đổi bộ nhận diện thương hiệu. Sau hơn 20 năm hình thành và phát triển, đây chính là thời điểm đánh dấu sự chuyển mình của Tập đoàn Sơn Hà Xanh để vươn tới sứ mệnh, tầm nhìn và giá trị mới. 
Đặt mình trong hoàn cảnh cần đổi mới để có đáp ứng nhu cầu chung , trách nhiệm với xã hội, và hơn hết là vươn lên trên chặng đường phát triển vị thế một doanh nghiệp hàng đầu trong lòng người tiêu dùng cũng như trong dòng chảy thị trường. Tập Đoàn Sơn Hà Xanh - Son Ha Green Group JSC được thành lập với tôn chỉ: “Tiên phong, dẫn dắt đem đến cho thị trường những sản phẩm - dịch vụ theo tiêu chuẩn Quốc tế ứng dụng giải pháp công nghệ Xanh và năng lượng tái tạo thân thiện với môi trường vì một cuộc sống xanh - hiện đại cho người Việt.”

1 mixeur plongeant, le plus maniable de tous !

Pour un encombrement minimal, il remplace de nombreux autres appareils : blender, batteur, hachoir !

- Le couteau étoile pour mixer, hacher et réduire en purée ; 
- Le couteau hachoir pour couper et émincer
- Le disque fouet pour monter, battre, émulsionner ; 
- Le disque mélangeur pour aérer, mélanger et homogénéiser. 

Son moteur à courant alternatif développe une puissance de 120 à 250 watts, pour une rotation de la lame exceptionnelle allant jusqu’à 20 000 tours/minute.

Produit à l'entretien facile et rapide, robuste et extrêmement résistant et garanti à vie pour le moteur et mécanisme du Bamix.

Bref, le choix idéal aussi bien en cuisine professionnelle qu'en cuisine chez soi.

Name: Cleaning Hero
Description:
Cleaning Hero – Lizensierter Vertriebspartner von Hyla Schweiz

Hyla – Der innovative Luft- und Raumreiniger 

Hast du genug von Hausstaub der einfach nicht weniger werden will und Allergenen, die deine Luft und Lunge belasten? Entdecke wie der Hyla nicht nur tiefenreinigt, sondern deine Raumluft auf ein neues Level hebt – effizient, umweltfreundlich und einfach genial.

Anstatt Staub und Schmutz in Beuteln oder Filtern zu sammeln und ihnen den Nährboden für Schimmel zu bieten, nutzt der Hyla Wasser um Staub, Allergene und Schadstoffe zu binden. Dies sorgt für eine gründliche Reinigung, ohne dass diese Partikel wieder in die Luft abgegeben werden.

Was macht den Hyla besonders?

Wasserfiltertechnologie : Beseitigt effektiv Staub, Allergene und Schadstoffe aus der Luft und sorgt für eine saubere, gesunde Umgebung.

Vielseitigkeit : Der Hyla vereint über 30 Funktionen in einem Gerät – vom Staubsaugen  über Luftreinigung  und Aromatisieren bis hin zu Nass- und Tiefenreinigung von Textilien .

Energieeffizienz : Hohe Reinigungsleistung bei niedrigem Energieverbrauch und komplett ohne Filterwechsel.

Langlebigkeit : Der Hyla überzeugt mit einer beeindruckenden Lebensdauer von rund 20 Jahren , was ihn zu einer langfristigen Investition für Ihr Zuhause oder Büro macht.

Warum jeder einen Hyla haben sollte:

Gesundheitliche Vorteile : Der Hyla verbessert jede Luftqualität, besonders in Haushalten mit Allergikern oder Atemwegserkrankungen.

Einfache Handhabung : Der Hyla ist intuitiv zu nutzen. Keine Beutel oder Filterwechsel nötig – einfach Wasser wechseln und weiter reinigen.

Nachhaltig und umweltfreundlich : Weniger Abfall durch die Nutzung von Wasser als Filtermedium.

Der Hyla ist die perfekte Wahl für alle, die ein gesundes Raumklima, eine hohe Reinigungsleistung und gleichzeitig eine umweltfreundliche Lösung suchen. Mit über 30 Funktionen und einer Lebensdauer von rund 20 Jahren ist der Hyla eine lohnenswerte und nachhaltige Investition.

Name: Conick Air Cooler
Description:
At Conick Air Cooler, we believe that comfort is not just a luxury—it’s a necessity. Founded with the vision of bringing affordable, energy-efficient, and sustainable cooling solutions to homes, offices, and industries, Conick has emerged as a leading name in India’s cooling technology sector.

Headquartered at Shendra MIDC, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Conick Air Cooler has quickly established itself as a next-generation cooling brand, blending cutting-edge innovation, modern design, and eco-conscious engineering. With a strong manufacturing base, a commitment to quality, and a passion for creating value, we are on a mission to make “Cooling Smarter, Greener, and Better.”

 Our Vision

To be recognized as a global leader in air cooling technology, delivering solutions that combine comfort, sustainability, and innovation for every climate, every space, and every customer.

 Our Mission

To design and manufacture world-class air coolers that provide superior cooling at an affordable cost.

To promote energy efficiency and eco-friendly cooling in line with India’s sustainability goals.

To innovate continuously with modern designs, smart features, and durable engineering.

To build long-term relationships with customers, partners, and distributors by delivering trust, transparency, and technology-driven excellence.

 What We Do

Conick Air Cooler specializes in manufacturing, designing, and supplying high-performance air coolers tailored to diverse needs. From residential comfort solutions to large-scale industrial cooling systems, our product line is built to serve India’s climate while meeting international quality standards.

Our coolers are known for:

Energy Efficiency – Maximum cooling, minimal power consumption.

Eco-Friendly Design – Sustainable materials & water-saving technology.

Durability – Built to withstand Indian weather conditions.

Modern Aesthetics – Sleek designs for homes, offices & commercial spaces.

گروه تولیدی رُفت در شهریور 1392 با هدف تولید لوازم و قطعات جانبی جاروبرقی شروع به کار کرد. از آنجایی که تقریبا هیچ برندی به صورت متمرکز در این زمینه فعالیت نداشت، رُفت برای تبدیل شدن به یک برند مطرح که به صورت تخصصی در زمینه تولید انواع قطعات تولیدی و مصرفی جاروبرقی فعالیت کند، با پشتوانهی نیروهای متخصص خود در این مسیر قدم نهاد.

گروه تولیدی رُفت که در زمینه تولید لوازم جانبی جاروبرقی فعالیت میکند، محصولاتی چون لوله خرطومی در سایز و ابعاد و قطر متفاوت، لوله تلسکوپی در مدلهای مختلف، کیسه جاروبرقی برای انواع جاروبرقی خانگی، صنعتی و سطلی، فیلتر جاروبرقی، زانویی جاروبرقی و ... را به تولید رسانده است.
این محصولات با توجه به نیاز مشتریان و شرکتها، در سایز و ابعاد و ویژگیهای خاص قابل تولید است تا عملکرد قابل قبولی را برای مشتریان خود رقم بزنیم.

حال پس از حدود 10 سال فعالیت در این صنعت و تجربه تولید انواع قطعات مورد نیاز، توانستهایم با تکیه بر دانش فنی و استفاده از متریال مرغوب و درجه یک در تولید، مشتریان بزرگ و کوچک زیادی را در این چرخه همراهی کنیم. 

ـــــــــــــــــــــ

Roft Manufacturing Group started its operations in August-September 2013 to produce vacuum cleaner accessories and parts. Description:
With rapidly increasing temperatures around the globe, air con systems are becoming a necessary appliance for many households. Ironically, they contribute to environmental problems that increase the need for air cons in the first place. It does not have to be like that. Meet KLIMA.
KLIMA AC is the next-generation, customizable 3D printed air con system that improves performance and reduces energy consumption.
Most air cons on the market are made out of non-recyclable materials. They are costly in production and maintenance, they consume a lot of energy and on top of that, most are noisy and considered a somewhat ugly home appliance.
We re-imagined air con system to achieve overall efficiency and lower the negative impact on the environment.
Klima is manufactured using recycle-able 3D Printed parts, allowing us to create more attractive and personalized designs while reducing the overall production costs and environmental footprint.
The next step is to develop a prototype.
We are looking to partner up with industry experts in the manufacturing industry to turn our vision into a product.
Visit our website https://klima-ac.weebly.com/ and leave your email address if you’re interested in collaborating.

Name: Karfo
Description:
Karfo was found by a team of 30 years of engineering and design experience in home appliance, who have a simple mission in mind: to create home appliances that were both eco-friendly and practical. 

47% of food waste comes from households, but people are often unsure about how they can help solve the problem. That’s where we come in. We wanted to develop appliances that would help people reduce their waste and energy consumption, while also creating products that were easy to use and enjoyable. Backed by science, we give people the tools and knowledge they need to take action on food waste.

We began with a home composter, designed to turn kitchen scraps into compost quickly and easily. Not only did this reduce landfill waste, but it allowed people to use the compost in their own gardens and green spaces. Our team then decided to take their mission a step further and create a Cold Brew Coffee Maker made from recycled materials. Not only did this help reduce the amount of waste going into landfills, but it provided an enjoyable way to start the day with a delicious drink. 

We're proud to offer our customers products that are both stylish and sustainable, accessible. We hoped to inspire people to create a more sustainable lifestyle, while also providing the convenience and joy of home appliances.

Name: Nhơn Hòa
Description:
GIỚI THIỆU CÔNG TY TNHH SẢN XUẤT CÂN NHƠN HÒA
Tiền thân của Công ty TNHH Sản Xuất Cân Nhơn Hòa là Tổ sản xuất Nhơn Hòa được thành lập bởi ông Lý Siêng vào năm 1983, chuyên sản xuất các loại cân đồng hồ lò xo. Trải qua nhiều năm xây dựng và phát triển cùng những biến động của nền kinh tế, với truyền thống chất lượng luôn được gìn giữ và phát huy, Cân Nhơn Hòa đã từng bước khẳng định mình, nỗ lực vươn lên trở thành thương hiệu uy tín trên thị trường cân đồng hồ lò xo. 
Bên cạnh các sản phẩm cân phục vụ đa dạng lĩnh vực đời sống như: cân cơ truyền thống dùng trong thương mại, cân điện tử, cân sức khỏe, cân nhà bếp,... Nhơn Hòa còn đầu tư phát triển cho nhiều mảng khác như sản xuất kéo (bao gồm kéo gia dụng, kéo cắt tóc, kéo cắt may... mang thương hiệu Nhơn Hòa – Nguyễn Đình), bộ phụ kiện dùng trong mảng xây dựng (hộp ga thu nước và phễu thu nước). 
Cân Nhơn Hòa được đánh giá cao về chất lượng và độ bền, chúng tôi luôn hướng đến việc tối ưu về công năng sản phẩm trước khi đến tay người tiêu dùng. Trong suốt chặng đường từ khi bắt đầu thành lập đến nay, Cân Nhơn Hòa vẫn luôn giữ vững tinh thần, quyết tâm theo đuổi giá trị cốt lõi "Chất lượng là truyền thống của Nhơn Hòa". Với phương châm ấy, chúng tôi đã luôn nỗ lực cả về nhân lực với đội ngũ lao động chuyên nghiệp và vật lực thông qua đầu tư máy móc, trang thiết bị hiện đại, để từ đó xây dựng uy tín thương hiệu, tạo dựng niềm tin cho khách hàng.
Bên cạnh mục tiêu sản xuất kinh doanh hiệu quả, tạo ra những sản phẩm chất lượng, Cân Nhơn Hòa cũng thực hiện tốt các nghĩa vụ với nhà nước, chăm lo cho người lao động cũng như quan tâm các hoạt động từ thiện, chung tay đóng góp vào lợi ích của cộng đồng, mang đến những giá trị đẹp chia sẻ cùng xã hội. 
Với thành tích nổi bật và những đóng góp to lớn cho sự nghiệp xây dựng và phát triển đất nước, công ty TNHH Sản Xuất Cân Nhơn Hòa đã được Chủ tịch nước trao tặng Huân Chương lao động hạng Nhất, Nhì, Ba, vinh dự liên tiếp 23 năm liền đạt danh hiệu "Hàng Việt Nam Chất lượng cao"

Name: Mixto AS
Description:
Mixto er dedikert til ekte matopplevelser! Vi er offisiell distributør av Thermomix i Norge siden 2017, og vår visjon er å inspirere nordmenn til å lage ren og naturlig mat. Thermomix er en unik kjøkkenmaskin som gjør matlagingen raskere og enklere. Med innebygd wi-fi gir den tilgang til over 70 000 oppskrifter, og den har et imponerende utvalg av funksjoner som vekt, røring under oppvarming, elting, damping, sous-vide, fermentering og slow cooking. Vår showroom på Skøyen i Oslo gir deg muligheten til å oppleve maskinen gjennom drop-in, ukentlige demoer eller matlagingskurs. Våre selvstendige konsulenter tilbyr både online og hjemme-demoer for å hjelpe deg med å utforske Thermomix-mulighetene.
Thermomix er en divisjon av Vorwerk, som med €2,9 mrd omsetning, 12 000 fast ansatte 600 000+ selvstendige konsulenter er blant verdens størst familieeide selskaper. Vorwerk har hovedkontor og fabrikk i Wuppertal i Tyskland og er kjent for å utvikle innovative produkter av høy kvalitet og brukervennlighet for hjemmemarkedet. Vorwerk har eksistert siden 1883 og har bygd opp sin virksomhet i tett kontakt med kunder. Demonstrasjon av produktenes spesielle egenskaper er en viktig del av salgsprosessen. Thermomix er den ultimate kjøkkenmaskinen med stor internasjonal suksess.

Die Herstellung erfolgt in modernen Produktionsstätten in China, wobei wir höchste Sorgfalt auf die Einhaltung dieser Standards legen. So garantieren wir langlebige, hochwertige Produkte mit einem zeitlosen Design.
•	Kundensupport: Unser engagiertes Support-Team steht unseren Kunden bei allen Fragen und Anliegen individuell zur Seite und versucht einen reibungslosen Ablauf bei Kundenanliegen zu gewährleisten. Das Team sorgt dafür, dass die Kunden mit unseren Produkten und dem Service stets eine positive Erfahrung haben.
•	Lokale Wurzeln, globale Stärke: Als in Köln verwurzeltes Unternehmen verbinden wir infrastrukturelle Regionsvorteile und enge Zusammenarbeit mit lokalen Partnern mit einer internationalen Präsenz. Diese Kombination ermöglicht es uns, die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden weltweit zu verstehen und passgenaue Lösungen anzubieten.

Unsere Haushaltsgeräte kombinieren Innovation, Langlebigkeit und Benutzerfreundlichkeit und bereichern Ihren Alltag – ob in der Küche oder im Wohnbereich.
